title: ayapana jaramillii
intro: Ayapana jaramillii, also known as American feverfew, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the Americas. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Ayapana jaramillii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Ayapana jaramillii is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal remedies, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment.
